narrative:
St. Henry South (precinct in Mercer County) has 691 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.8 percentage points.
